# Sean Taylor

> BAFTA-winning exec producer, product architect, fractional CPO, and author. 30 years making games and interactive amusements. Made in Scotland, based in Dubai.

## Identity

- Name: Sean Taylor
- Location: Dubai, UAE (originally Scotland)
- Website: https://seantaylor.work
- Notes: https://notes.seantaylor.work
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mrseantaylor/
- GitHub: https://github.com/kwangchow/
- Substack: https://playhaus.substack.com/archive
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kwangchow/
- X: https://x.com/kwangchow

## What I do

I make great things and help people make great things. BAFTA-winning exec producer, game design author, and 16× ROI ecosystem builder. Currently: fractional CPO, startup advisor, ecosystem builder, and agentic-amusements experimenter.

## Key achievements

- Started career at DMA Design (now Rockstar North) during production of the original Grand Theft Auto — one of the most commercially successful entertainment franchises in history. Credits include GTA, GTA 2, and Body Harvest
- Produced Quarrel from vertical slice to award-winning IP at UK casual games pioneer Denki — scaling the team, establishing the studio's original IP development process, and winning a BAFTA and three TIGA Awards
- Built InGAME (Innovation for Games and Media Enterprise) — the UK's national games innovation centre — from the ground up. 177 R&D projects, £85M in economic impact, 16× return on public investment in five years (2018–2023). https://innovationforgames.com
- Co-authored "Punk Playthings: Provocations for 21st Century Game Makers" (CRC Press, 2017) with Chris Lowthorpe. Remixed in 2026 as Punk Provocations — a 20-essay series on Substack with a landing page at https://seantaylor.work/punk-provocations
- Shipped 100+ games across console, mobile, web and emerging platforms. Brands include Family Guy, Fox, Heineken, Lego, Mad Libs, Mattel, Moshi Monsters, Nestlé, Reebok, Scooby Doo, Shrek, and Star Wars

## Domains of expertise

- Executive production and product architecture
- Fractional CPO and startup advisory
- R&D and innovation strategy / ecosystem building
- Video game production and design
- Creative industries policy and public sector advisory
- Games education and skills development
- Playful design and interactive experiences
- Agentic amusements and emerging platforms

## Current projects

- Fractional CPO and startup advisor
- Ecosystem builder
- Agentic-amusements experimenter
- Playhaus (Substack / Playful Media Lab, with Dr Chris Lowthorpe) — https://playhaus.substack.com
- Punk Provocations (2026 remix of Punk Playthings) — https://seantaylor.work/punk-provocations

## Site structure

- / — Landing page (summary, highlights, follow links)
- /notes — Blog and notes (hosted on Bear Blog at notes.seantaylor.work)
- /punk-provocations — Punk Provocations: twenty provocations for game makers in the age of amusement, with Chris Lowthorpe. Remix of Punk Playthings (2017) for post-industrial reality. Each flyer links to its Substack essay.
